element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each X-Men character has unique moves and capabilities that must be learned individually before progressing
Moves are activated by control combinations; players learn frame-by-frame as they progress through stages
Resource management becomes critical as difficulty increases
Encourages exploration and risk-taking in optional areas
Pattern learning and character-specific combat strategies required
Players gain strategic control over difficulty escalation by choosing stage order

element_introduction_order.element: Shared life pool across all five X-Men
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Failure mechanics compound; loss affects entire team rather than individual characters

element_introduction_order.element: Linear boss gauntlet (three consecutive mandatory bosses)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Forces player mastery of multiple character styles in succession
Tests against Omega Red and Juggernaut holograms before Avalon assault
Each X-Men follows unique path; requires full mastery of chosen character
Ultimate test combining all learned skills and character mastery

typical_relief_triggers: Freedom to select next level (player agency reduces tension)
Brief respite between character stages before mandatory boss gauntlet
typical_tension_triggers: Shared life pool across team (failure multiplier)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty with player-controlled mid-game pacing; early freedom transitions to enforced linear gauntlet in final act

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Three X icons hidden throughout stages signal collectible optional content

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate; introduces character movesets and basic enemy patterns. Player selects stage order to manage difficulty progression
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating; three mandatory consecutive boss battles force mastery of character matchups. Danger Room testing introduces challenging hologram patterns
difficulty_curve.late_game: High; individual character final stages combine all learned mechanics. Magneto confrontation requires full mastery synthesis
notable_spikes: Transition from level selection freedom to mandatory three-boss gauntlet
Danger Room hologram difficulty jump (Omega Red and Juggernaut)
Character-branching final stages (varies by character selection)
Magneto final boss after Exodus confrontation

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of five X-Men (Beast, Cyclops, Gambit, Psylocke, Wolverine) has dedicated level with unique layout and boss encounter exploiting character weaknesses/strengths. Psylocke stage documented as first stage example
Three X icons hidden throughout each stage create optional exploration paths; incentivizes replays and risk assessment. Health pickups scattered to manage resource tension
After beating first five stages, players earn password and gain freedom to tackle remaining levels in chosen order. Creates strategic difficulty scaling and replayability
Three consecutive mandatory boss battles follow level selection freedom. Forces character mastery across multiple matchups without respite
Danger Room stages feature holographic enemies (Omega Red, Juggernaut) as skill verification checkpoint before final Avalon invasion
Final progression splits; each X-Men character follows different path through Avalon with unique stage layout and challenges before converging on Magneto
